data.content: Plan approved. The proposed work is feasible and correctly centers the lease as the sole identity authority, which matches the required contract. The implementation split is sound: remove non-lease identity propagation from Knots calls, normalize lease-derived metadata for display, and restore ReTakes step visibility through backend metadata hydration rather than UI-specific patching. The test strategy is adequate because it covers both the contract boundary (no identity flags outside lease creation) and the user-facing regression (normalized handoff metadata plus visible shipped-step history in ReTakes). No knot invariants are defined, and the plan does not introduce obvious security or performance concerns beyond the need to keep any shipped-step fallback durable and read-efficient.
